name: Acrobat Boots
description: Grants a +2 competence bonus on Tumble checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day; spending charges grants an enhancement bonus to speed (+10/+15/+20 ft) for 1 round.

name: Amulet of Tears
description: Has 3 charges renewed each dawn. Spending 1-3 charges grants temporary hit points (12/18/24) lasting up to 10 minutes. A go-to defensive consumable in a single item.

name: Amulet of Retributive Healing
description: When you heal an ally, you regain hit points equal to half the amount healed. Activatable 3/day as a swift action. Excellent for dedicated healers.

name: Amulet of Toxin Delay
description: When activated (1/day, immediate), creates a delay poison effect on you for 2 rounds. Can be triggered when required to save against poison.

name: Amulet of Fortune Prevailing
description: Once per day, reroll a saving throw before success or failure is determined (must use second result). Three aventurine stones track charges.

name: Belt of Battle
description: Has 3 charges renewed each dawn. Spending charges as a swift action grants 1 extra move action (1 charge), 1 extra standard action (2 charges), or 1 extra full-round action (3 charges). One of the most powerful action-economy items in 3.5.

name: Belt of Hidden Pouches
description: Has 10 visible pockets, each functioning as a small bag of holding (0.5 cu ft, 5 lbs, 1/10 weight). Also has 20 secret pockets behind the visible ones, for 30 total. No item wider than 6 inches.

name: Belt of One Mighty Blow
description: Once per day (swift), your next melee attack deals extra damage: +1d8 (light weapon), +2d6 (one-handed), or +3d6 (two-handed).

name: Boots of Agile Leaping
description: Allows adding Dex modifier instead of Str modifier on Jump checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day for +10/+15/+20 ft competence bonus on Jump for 1 round.

name: Boots of the Battle Charger
description: Once per day (swift), make a charge attack as a standard action (movement up to your speed rather than double). Excellent for reducing action cost of charging.

name: Boots of Dragonstriding
description: Grants +2 competence on Climb and Jump checks (continuous). Once per day, activate to gain a climb speed equal to your land speed for 10 rounds.

name: Boots of Landing
description: Always land on your feet when falling; reduce fall damage by 2 dice (falls of 20 ft or less deal no damage). Continuous effect, no activation.

name: Dimension Stride Boots
description: +2 competence on Jump checks (continuous). Has 5 charges/day; spending charges allows short-range teleportation with line of sight (no chance of error).

name: Bracers of Quick Strike
description: Once per day (swift), if you already made a full attack this turn, make one extra attack at your full BAB. Must be worn 24 hours before first use.

name: Bracers of Opportunity
description: When an opponent grants you an attack of opportunity, you may make it even if you've already reached your normal AoO limit that round. 2/day.

name: Arcanist's Gloves
description: 2/day (swift): add +2 to caster level of the next 1st-level arcane spell cast before end of turn. Cheap and useful for any arcane caster.

name: Brawler's Gauntlets
description: 3/day (swift): for 1 round, grants +2 bonus on grapple checks and damage rolls when making unarmed attacks. Good for monks and grapple-focused fighters.

name: Gloves of Lightning
description: 3/day: ranged touch attack (30 ft) dealing 1d8+5 electricity damage. +3 bonus to attack if target wears metal armor. Good cheap offensive utility.

name: Gloves of Manual Prowess
description: Has 3 charges/day (swift). Spending charges grants +5/+7/+10 competence bonus on next Disable Device, Forgery, Open Lock, Sleight of Hand, or Use Rope check. Must begin check within 1 round.

name: Cloak of the Salamander
description: Covered in dancing flames (harmless to you). 3/day (immediate): any creature striking you with a natural weapon or nonreach melee weapon takes 1d6+7 fire damage until start of your next turn.

name: Cloak of Predatory Vigor
description: While in a rage or frenzy, activate (swift) to heal damage equal to your Hit Dice. Barbarian must-have for extended combats.

name: Cloak of Stone
description: +5 competence bonus on Hide and Move Silently checks (continuous). Once per day, activate (standard) to merge with stone as meld into stone.

name: Cloak of Weaponry
description: Has an extradimensional space holding one weapon (up to 25 lbs, Medium or smaller). Activate (swift) to draw or stow the weapon instantly. Great concealed-weapon item for city play.

name: Circlet of Mages
description: +2 competence bonus on Concentration checks (continuous). Has 3 charges/day; spending charges lets you retain a prepared spell or spell slot after casting it (up to 1st/2nd/3rd level).

name: Enduring Amulet
description: Continuous endure elements effect. Has 3 charges/day (immediate); spending charges grants resistance to cold and fire (10/15/20) for 1 round. Ideal for wilderness and dungeon environments.

name: Necklace of Warning
description: Grants a +2 bonus to your flat-footed AC (up to your normal AC cap). Continuous effect; helps against rogues, ambushes, and other flat-footed situations.

name: Heartseeking Amulet
description: 3/day (swift): your next melee attack before end of turn is a melee touch attack instead of a normal attack. Excellent for bypassing heavily armored foes.

name: Farspeaking Amulet
description: The central crystal (worn) links telepathically to up to 4 small red charm-crystals carried by others. Activate (swift) to communicate with any charm-carrier on the same plane. Range: unlimited on same plane.

name: Mask of Sweet Air
description: Breathe freely through smoke, dust, and fumes (continuous). Grants +5 bonus on saves against airborne stench attacks and inhaled poisons (cloudkill, stinking cloud, troglodyte stench, etc.).

name: Dragon Mask
description: 2/day (swift): see invisibility as the spell, for 5 minutes. Simple, reliable anti-invisible utility for any class.

name: Sending Stones
description: A pair of matched stones. Activate (standard) to send a message of up to 25 words to the holder of the other stone (same plane). If one stone is destroyed, the other becomes useless.

name: Scrying Shard
description: A character of any class can cast scrying using this pink crystal as a focus (the spell itself must be cast or otherwise available). Lowers the class restriction barrier for scrying.

name: Lockpicking Ring
description: +5 competence bonus on Open Lock checks (continuous). Once per day, activate to cast knock by touching the ring to a portal. Solid rogue/dungeon item.

name: Brooch of Stability
description: Once per day: when reduced to -1 or lower HP, automatically stabilize (assuming damage wasn't lethal). Cheap life insurance for any character.

name: Dispelling Cord
description: 5/day (swift): gain +2 competence bonus on all dispel checks made until end of turn. Each activation unties one of five visible knots, tracking daily uses. Worn around the chest.

name: Bag of Endless Caltrops
description: 5/day (move action): pull out a handful of caltrops covering a 5-ft square. Caltrops are non-magical but free. Pairs well with withdrawal tactics or defending chokepoints.

name: Magic Bedroll
description: Provides endure elements while you sleep in it. After 8 hours of sleep, recover 1 extra hit point per character level in addition to normal recovery. Getting in/out is a full-round action.

name: Orb of Mental Renewal
description: Has 3 charges/day. Spending charges heals ability damage to Int, Wis, or Cha: 1 charge heals 4 pts to one score or 2 pts to all three; scales up with more charges. Must be held while touching the target.

name: Rod of Bodily Restoration
description: Has 3 charges/day. Spending charges heals physical ability damage (Str/Dex/Con): 1 charge heals 4 pts to one score or 2 pts to all three; scales with more charges. Must touch target (or hold rod for self).

name: Rod of Escape
description: 2/day: cast jump. 2/day: cast knock. 1/day: create a 5-ft-radius spherical ward that repels nonmagical water for 10 minutes (allows crossing rivers or working underwater in an air bubble).

name: Runestaff of Abjuration
description: Spend a prepared arcane spell/slot to cast (3/day each): dismissal, dispel magic, lesser globe of invulnerability, repulsion, resist energy, or shield. Each spell costs a slot of equal or higher level.

name: Runestaff of Opening
description: Spend a prepared arcane spell/slot (same level or higher) to cast (3/day each): knock, open/close, passwall, or shatter. Perfect dungeon utility runestaff for arcane casters.

name: Horned Helm
description: Antlers join with your skull, granting a natural secondary gore attack (1d8 + half Str bonus). Treated as a magic weapon for DR purposes. Continuous, no activation.

name: Helm of Glorious Recovery
description: Once per day (swift): regain hp equal to your character level + Cha modifier. Excellent for paladins and other Charisma-based fighters who need emergency healing.

name: Chronocharm of the Laughing Rogue
description: Once per day (immediate): reroll a Disable Device check just attempted (even after setting off a trap, but before consequences apply). Multiple chronocharms can be worn simultaneously.

name: Chronocharm of the Celestial Wanderer
description: Once per day (immediate): immediately reroll a single Listen or Spot check just attempted. Second result replaces first. Multiple chronocharms can stack in the throat slot.

name: Formless Vest
description: Once per day (immediate): when struck by a critical hit or sneak attack, take half the damage after it is determined but before it is dealt.

name: Goggles of Foefinding
description: While wearing these goggles, ignore cover bonuses to AC for ranged attacks (but not total cover). Continuous effect, no activation. Useful for archers.
